verifiedTaskRepairs.finding: Bounded database idempotency cleanup could evict still-pending writes after the cache limit was exceeded, allowing the same requestId to execute twice.
Project lifecycle idempotency cleanup could evict queued operations before completion and admit a duplicate lifecycle mutation.
The credential broker accepted provider identifiers and persisted credential references outside the authoritative contract schemas.
The Renderer bridge coordinator permanently retained serialized request argument keys, including manuscript content, after requests completed.
Concurrent partial application settings updates merged outside the serialized write transaction and could overwrite independent fields.
